channel.title: Causal AI daily picks
channel.description: Top-5 daily picks from new research, engineering posts, and tools across causal inference, causal ML, causal language models, and online experimentation.

item.title: Causal AI daily picks — 2026-06-12
item.description: _No picks today._

item.title: Causal AI daily picks — 2026-06-11
item.description: 1. How Useful is Causal Invariance for Domain Adaptation in Finite-Sample Settings? — Other · score 98 · arXiv stat.ML · Julia Kostin, Kasra Jalaldoust, Elias Bareinboim, Samory Kpotufe et al. (5 authors) 2. On Causal Discovery in the Presence of Deterministic Relations — Other · score 90 · Semantic Scholar: Kun Zhang causal discovery · Loka Li, Haoyue Dai, Hanin Al Ghothani, Biwei Huang et al. (9 authors) 3. On Causal Discovery in the Presence of Deterministic Relations — Other · score 90 · Semantic Scholar: Kun Zhang causal discovery · Hanin Al Ghothani, Isaac Bentwich, Guan-Hong Chen, Haoyue Dai et al. (9 authors) 4. When Representative Samples Produce Worse Outcomes: Scale-up Decisions and Testing in Small-Budget RCTs — Experimentation · score 64 · arXiv stat.ME · Hannah Li, Hongseok Namkoong, Isaac Scheinfeld 5. (7 authors)

item.title: Causal AI daily picks — 2026-05-16
item.description: 1. pymc-labs/CausalPy 0.8.1 — Other · score 55 · pymc-labs/CausalPy releases 2. Lambenthan/empericalwiki — 经管实证研究的 AI 知识库 — 从文献阅读到 Stata 执行，一条流水线串到底。基于 Karpathy 的 LLM-Wiki 理念，按实证研究 10 类实体（变量 / 数据集 / 模型 / 机制 /… — Causal LMs · score 34 · GitHub topic:econometrics 3. antonbarr-data/dqt — A Data Quality Tool that tells you what and surfaces the why — Other · score 30 · GitHub topic:causal-inference
